item.title: Magnesium and dry ice

item.title: Triangle-shaped wheels
item.description: How triangle-shaped wheels can move in an experiment about motion and physics.

item.title: Cooking without air
item.description: A science experiment about cooking without air.

media:content.media:description: A science experiment about cooking without air.

item.title: Cutting water with a superhydrophobic knife
item.description: In this video I use a specially treated super hydrophobic knife to cut water droplets in half! I see how small of a water drop I can get!

media:content.media:title: Cutting water with a superhydrophobic knife
media:content.media:description: In this video I use a specially treated super hydrophobic knife to cut water droplets in half! I see how small of a water drop I can get!

item.title: The zombie ant experiment
item.description: In this video I show you how I made an ant think it was dead by putting a specific chemical on it that ants use to signal when they have died. This is how ants know to put the ants that have passed away into the ant graveyard.

media:content.media:title: The zombie ant experiment
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how I made an ant think it was dead by putting a specific chemical on it that ants use to signal when they have died. This is how ants know to put the ants that have passed away into the ant graveyard.

item.title: Can diamonds be broken?
item.description: The Action Lab explores whether diamonds can be broken in this physics experiment.

media:content.media:title: Can diamonds be broken?
media:content.media:description: The Action Lab explores whether diamonds can be broken in this physics experiment.

item.description: How oxygen affects fire in a science experiment.
